articles.title: Leipzig tighten top-four grip as Union's Eta suffers second loss
articles.description: RB Leipzig moved closer to a Champions League return after thumping Union Berlin 3-1 at home on Friday and handing coach Marie-Louise Eta her second straight Bundesliga defeat. Leipzig missed out on Europe this season for the first time since their 2016-17 top-flight debut, but a seventh win in their past eight matches kept them on track for the Champions League next term.

articles.description: KEYSER, W.Va. — Keyser’s Luca Altobello and Frankfort’s Bailey Ferguson led the individuals, and the Frankfort boys and Allegany girls won team titles at the area track and field meet Wednesday at Keyser High School. Altobello finished first in the 800-meter run in a time of 2:00.53, and he won the 1600m in 4:18.70. His 1600m finish was a Keyser record, and he set a new school 3200m mark ...

articles.description: Can Sunderland rediscover home strength? The Stadium of Light has been a key asset for Sunderland this season, but that advantage has waned in recent weeks.
